title: mapprotocol/map-contracts: v1.6.0
author: Phil
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
MAP Protocol Contracts update, include: 
 
 MAPO clients 
 EVM chains 
 zero knowledge proof light client 
 Near 
 Light client on MAP Relay Chain 
 Ethereum 
 BNB Chain 
 Ploygon (MATIC) 
 Near 
 Klaytn 
 Conflux 
 Bitcoin 
 Oracle 
 
 
 Protocol mangement contracts 
 
 Changes: 
 
 Add ILightVerifier interfaces. 
 Add Oracle light client. 
 Add BNB light client v2. 
 Add MAP Protocol light client v2.
